datasetAgreementTitle: UCI Diabetes 130-US Hospitals Dataset — Hispanic Subset
datasetAgreementGeneral: This dataset is a race-specific subset of the UCI Diabetes 130-US Hospitals dataset, containing de-identified hospital encounter data for Hispanic diabetic patients. It follows HIPAA guidelines and is intended solely for research purposes.
term1: You acknowledge that this dataset is intended solely for diabetes research, clinical studies, and related academic purposes.
term2: You agree not to use this dataset for any commercial, non-research, or unauthorised purposes.
term3: You agree not to attempt re-identification of patients or linkage with external datasets to compromise patient privacy.
term4: You must properly attribute the UCI Machine Learning Repository and original data contributors in all publications and reports.
term5: You accept full responsibility for ensuring ethical use in compliance with all applicable regulations including HIPAA and relevant IRB approvals.
term6: You agree to use this dataset only for hospital readmission prediction research and will not use it for any discriminatory purpose.
